message:
fix(tests): add C3.4 constraints to test tokens in 5 crates

The C3.4 null-constraints rejection (type-level security) caused 27
test failures across perplexity-search, twilio, synology-chat,
google-calendar, and fcp-host. All test token helpers were missing
the required CapabilityConstraints CBOR payload, triggering
CapabilityDenied before reaching the operation under test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -38,5 +38,6 @@ url.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 chrono.workspace = true
+ciborium.workspace = true
 fcp-crypto.workspace = true
 wiremock.workspace = true
